    Index

    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    G

    game - Variable in class gamestates.State
     
    Game - Class in main
    The Game class is the main game loop and window manager, handling the initialization and execution of the game.
    Game() - Constructor for class main.Game
     
    GAME_BACKGROUND - Static variable in class utilz.LoadSave
     
    GAME_HEIGHT - Static variable in class main.Game
     
    GAME_WIDTH - Static variable in class main.Game
     
    GameContainer - Class in objects
    The GameContainer class represents a container object in the game
    GameContainer(int, int, int) - Constructor for class objects.GameContainer
     
    GameObject - Class in objects
    The GameObject class represents a general game object that has a position, hitbox, * and animation.
    GameObject(int, int, int) - Constructor for class objects.GameObject
     
    GameObjectFactory - Class in objects
    The GameObjectFactory class is responsible for creating instances of game objects * based on their type.
    GameObjectFactory() - Constructor for class objects.GameObjectFactory
     
    GameOverOverlay - Class in ui
    The GameOverOverlay class represents the overlay displayed when the player loses the game.
    GameOverOverlay(Playing) - Constructor for class ui.GameOverOverlay
     
    GameOverOverlayTest - Class in ui
     
    GameOverOverlayTest() - Constructor for class ui.GameOverOverlayTest
     
    GamePanel - Class in main
    GamePanel is the main panel that handles the rendering and user input (mouse and keyboard) for the game.
    GamePanel(Game) - Constructor for class main.GamePanel
     
    GameState - Enum Class in gamestates
    Enums for different gamestates in game.
    gamestates - package gamestates
     
    GameWindow - Class in main
    GameWindow is the main window for the game, managing the game panel and handling window focus events.
    GameWindow(GamePanel) - Constructor for class main.GameWindow
     
    GetAllLevels() - Static method in class utilz.LoadSave
    Loads all level images.

    GetEntPosWall(Rectangle2D.Float, float) - Static method in class utilz.HelpMethods
    Calculates the x-coordinate at which an entity hits a wall while moving horizontally.
    GetEntYPosHitSmth(Rectangle2D.Float, float) - Static method in class utilz.HelpMethods
    Calculates the y-coordinate at which an entity hits something while falling or jumping.
